findings.text: NAP-SRC-0029 is an email from accommodation@napier.ac.uk to Anfal Elbushra dated 12/03/2026 with an attachment named 'MISS ANFAL ELBUSHRA Student Licence.pdf' (3 MB).
The extracted text from NAP-SRC-0029 does not contain the binary content of the attached Student Licence PDF. No attachment extraction tool is available in the current toolset.

proposed_artifacts.content: The email NAP-SRC-0029 contains an attachment named 'MISS ANFAL ELBUSHRA Student Licence.pdf' (3 MB). The extracted text of the email confirms the attachment but does not include the binary PDF content. No attachment extraction tool is available in the current toolset. A follow-up task is proposed to extract the embedded PDF using a suitable tool.
proposed_artifacts.title: Extraction result for NAP-SRC-0029 attachment

proposed_tasks.instructions: Use an attachment extraction tool (e.g., Apache Tika, pdfdetach, or similar) to extract the embedded PDF file named 'MISS ANFAL ELBUSHRA Student Licence.pdf' from the source NAP-SRC-0029. The source is a PDF email with a 3 MB attachment. Save the extracted PDF as a new source with source_id derived from the attachment name.
proposed_tasks.title: Extract Student Licence PDF attachment from NAP-SRC-0029

summary: The source NAP-SRC-0029 is an email from Edinburgh Napier University to Anfal Elbushra attaching a file named 'MISS ANFAL ELBUSHRA Student Licence.pdf'. The extracted text confirms the attachment exists but does not contain the binary PDF content. No attachment extraction tool is available in the current toolset. A follow-up task is proposed to extract the embedded PDF using a suitable tool.

uncertainties.reason: The binary content of the Student Licence PDF attachment could not be extracted with the available tools.
